content: We can frame every autonomous AI agent as a walking, acting case-based reasoner that stores its past interaction trajectories as reusable cases, and retrieves and adapts these prior experiences to solve new open-ended tasks instead of relying solely on rigid pre-programmed rules or generic foundation model priors. This turns CBR’s case lifecycle (retrieve, reuse, revise, retain) provides a structured, interpretable framework for improving agent generalizability that complements black-box large language model reasoning.
